directors.title: Ava Sinclair
directors.bio: A director known for tense, character-driven thrillers shot almost entirely on location.

directors.title: Marcus Oyelaran
directors.bio: Began in documentary before moving to features; celebrated for naturalistic performances.

directors.title: Ingrid Halvorsen
directors.bio: A Norwegian filmmaker whose science fiction work is preoccupied with memory and loss.

directors.title: Danny Whitlock
directors.bio: A comedy specialist who came up through sketch television.
